creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
Created attachment 201832
failed dovecot build

Hi,

originally, it built, as I have a build log of a completed build:

-rw-r--r--  3 root  wheel   492929 Feb  7 08:48 /usr/local/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/12_0-amd64-2019Q1-unified/latest-per-pkg/dovecot-2.3.4.1.log
-rw-r--r--  3 root  wheel  3176332 Jan  1 18:51 /usr/local/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/12_0-amd64-2019Q1-unified/latest-per-pkg/dovecot-2.3.4_3.log


I updated my 2019Q1 cut shortly before running that build and one of its dependencies triggered the rebuild (don't know which).

Previous updates did not touch it:
